title: Malaysia-Bangladesh Trade Showcase 2026
description: The landmark annual trade expo hosting over 150 exhibitors displaying tech, machinery, commodities, and luxury goods from both nations.
agenda: Day 2: B2B Business Matchmaking Forums & Networking Lunch
speakers: High Commissioner of Malaysia to Bangladesh

title: Bilateral Investment Conclave
description: Exclusive closed-door summit presenting high-value investment profiles in EPZs, manufacturing, infrastructure, and green technology.
agenda: 09:30 AM: Investment Opportunities in Special Economic Zones
11:00 AM: Cross-Border Capital Flows & Regulatory Guidelines
02:00 PM: Joint Venture Case Studies & Interactive Panel

title: BMCCI Corporate Networking Dinner
description: Premium annual gala dinner for chamber members, diplomats, and international trade delegations to establish connections.
agenda: 08:15 PM: Presidential Address & Excellence Awards Ceremony
09:00 PM: Fine Dining & Professional Networking Session
